categoryDescription: Checks related to mobile device management, Chrome browser policies, Chrome OS devices, and endpoint security controls

checks.name: MDM Policy Audit
checks.description: Mobile devices accessing organizational data should be managed through MDM policies to enforce security controls
checks.recommendedValue: All mobile devices under MDM management with enforced security policies
checks.remediationSteps: Admin Console > Devices > Mobile devices > Review device management status > Enable advanced MDM for unmanaged devices

checks.name: Device Approval Requirements
checks.description: Mobile devices should require admin approval before accessing organizational data to prevent unauthorized device access
checks.recommendedValue: Device approval required before accessing organizational data
checks.remediationSteps: Admin Console > Devices > Mobile & endpoints > Settings > General > Require admin approval for device access

checks.name: Screen Lock Enforcement
checks.description: Screen lock should be enforced on all mobile devices to prevent unauthorized physical access to organizational data
checks.recommendedValue: Screen lock enforced with minimum PIN/password requirements
checks.remediationSteps: Admin Console > Devices > Mobile & endpoints > Settings > Universal settings > Screen lock > Enforce screen lock with minimum complexity

checks.name: Device Encryption Requirements
checks.description: Device encryption should be required on all mobile devices to protect data at rest from physical theft or loss
checks.recommendedValue: Encryption required on all managed devices
checks.remediationSteps: Admin Console > Devices > Mobile & endpoints > Settings > Universal settings > Encryption > Require device encryption

checks.name: Compromised Device Blocking
checks.description: Compromised devices should be automatically blocked from accessing organizational data to prevent data exposure
checks.recommendedValue: Compromised device detection and blocking enabled
checks.remediationSteps: Admin Console > Devices > Mobile & endpoints > Settings > Universal settings > Compromised devices > Block compromised devices from accessing data

checks.name: Jailbroken/Rooted Device Policy
checks.description: Jailbroken (iOS) or rooted (Android) devices bypass OS-level security controls and should be blocked from accessing organizational data
checks.recommendedValue: Jailbroken/rooted devices blocked from organizational data access
checks.remediationSteps: Admin Console > Devices > Mobile & endpoints > Settings > Universal settings > Compromised devices > Block jailbroken/rooted devices

checks.name: Chrome Browser Management
checks.description: Chrome browsers used to access organizational data should be enrolled in Chrome Browser Cloud Management for policy enforcement
checks.recommendedValue: Chrome browsers enrolled in Cloud Management with policies enforced
checks.remediationSteps: Admin Console > Devices > Chrome > Settings > Review and configure Chrome browser policies for managed browsers

checks.name: Chrome Extension Whitelist/Blocklist
checks.description: Chrome extensions should be managed through an allowlist or blocklist to prevent malicious extensions from accessing organizational data
checks.recommendedValue: Extension installation restricted to admin-approved extensions via allowlist
checks.remediationSteps: Admin Console > Devices > Chrome > Apps & extensions > Configure extension allowlist and blocklist

checks.name: Chrome OS Device Policies
checks.description: Chrome OS devices should have appropriate policies enforced including auto-update, login restrictions, and security settings
checks.recommendedValue: Chrome OS devices managed with enforced policies for updates, login, and security
checks.remediationSteps: Admin Console > Devices > Chrome > Settings > Device settings > Configure auto-update, login restrictions, and security policies

checks.name: Endpoint Verification Settings
checks.description: Endpoint verification provides device trust signals for context-aware access policies and should be enabled
checks.recommendedValue: Endpoint verification enabled for context-aware access
checks.remediationSteps: Admin Console > Devices > Mobile & endpoints > Settings > General > Enable endpoint verification for context-aware access policies

checks.name: Company-Owned Device Inventory
checks.description: Company-owned devices should be inventoried to maintain visibility over organizational assets accessing corporate data
checks.recommendedValue: Complete inventory of all company-owned devices maintained
checks.remediationSteps: Admin Console > Devices > Mobile devices > Review device inventory > Ensure all company-owned devices are registered and accounted for
